title: DoubleTreeMap platform seed
summary: Single-file seed case pinned to clean Chartsy history for early catalog/provide/grade/run development.
dominantIntent: Keep a narrow, behavior-preserving refactor target around a primitive double-key tree map utility.

suiteClaims.note: This is a platform development seed case only and does not claim to be the final balanced v1 suite.

lineage.historyNote: Pinned clean snapshot from the charting-engine replacement history.

prioritization.rationale: Narrow single-file case that lets early platform work exercise cataloging and workspace preparation without pretending the full suite is curated.

invariants.description: Stored entries remain iterated in key order according to the selected traversal direction.
Lookup and update behavior keeps the primitive double-key contract visible to later platform work.

validationCommands.purpose: Compile the charting module and its tests in the prepared workspace.
Run the charting module test suite as the seed case's baseline validator.

goldReference.label: double-tree-map-gold-placeholder
goldReference.note: Placeholder reference for the deterministic gold lane until the platform run/grade surfaces land.

noopReference.label: double-tree-map-noop-placeholder
noopReference.note: Placeholder reference for the noop control lane until the platform run/grade surfaces land.

effectiveScoring.note: Seed case carries no scoring overrides yet; the platform milestone only needs traceable metadata.
